evals.prompt: 我有一篇关于 transformer 的论文 PDF，帮我整理成知识库笔记
evals.expected_output: Claude 应该：1) 读取 PDF 内容 2) 创建 source note 在 wiki/sources/ 3) 提取关键概念创建 concept notes 4) 更新 index.md 和 log.md 5) 使用 wikilink 交叉引用
expectations: Creates a source note in wiki/sources/ with proper frontmatter (type: source, title, created, tags, status)
Extracts at least 3 core insights from the source
Creates at least 2 concept notes in wiki/concepts/ with wikilinks
Updates wiki/index.md with the new source and concepts
Appends an entry to wiki/log.md in append-only format
Uses [[wikilink]] format for all cross-references
Includes source citation in the source note

evals.prompt: query: 注意力机制和自注意力有什么区别
evals.expected_output: Claude 应该：1) 读取 wiki/index.md 2) 找到相关页面 3) 综合回答并引用来源 4) 将回答存入 wiki/questions/ 5) git commit
expectations: Reads wiki/index.md before answering
Provides a synthesized answer with citations to wiki pages
Creates a question note in wiki/questions/ with the answer
Question note has proper frontmatter (type: question, status: answered)
Answer references specific wiki pages using [[wikilinks]]
Includes a 'sources' section citing which wiki pages informed the answer

evals.expected_output: Claude 应该执行标准 lint 检查：孤儿页、断链、过期笔记、frontmatter 完整性
expectations: Checks for orphan pages (pages with no inbound wikilinks)
Checks for broken links (wikilinks pointing to nonexistent pages)
Checks for stale notes (status: draft older than 30 days)
Checks frontmatter completeness (all required fields present)
Produces a structured report with file paths and line references
Suggests specific fixes for each issue found

evals.expected_output: Claude 应该使用 video.py 下载视频并提取字幕，而不是使用 fetch-web.py
expectations: Uses video.py script (not fetch-web.py) for bilibili URL
Runs command: python3 scripts/video.py '<url>' -o .raw
Does NOT use fetch-web.py for video URLs
After download, ingests the resulting .plain file

evals.expected_output: Claude 应该执行深度 lint：包括知识空白检测、矛盾检测、证据强度、漂移检测
expectations: Runs gaps.py for knowledge gap detection
Checks for contradictions between sources
Evaluates evidence strength for concepts
Detects knowledge drift (low confidence, old verification dates)
Suggests research directions
Updates index-tags.md and index-topics.md

evals.prompt: 对比 Transformer 和 RNN 的优缺点
evals.expected_output: Claude 应该创建 comparison 类型的笔记，而不是普通 question
expectations: Creates note in wiki/comparisons/ (not wiki/questions/)
Frontmatter has type: comparison
Includes side-by-side analysis format
References existing concept notes with [[wikilinks]]
Cites sources for each comparison point

evals.prompt: 生成知识图谱，我想看看笔记之间的关系
evals.expected_output: Claude 应该调用 graph.py 生成交互式 HTML 知识图谱
expectations: Runs python3 scripts/graph.py
Generates wiki/meta/knowledge-graph.html
Reports number of nodes and edges
Mentions opening in browser to view

evals.prompt: 这个 PDF 讲了什么
evals.expected_output: 简单阅读不应触发 skill，Claude 应该直接读取并总结，不创建 wiki 结构
expectations: Does NOT create wiki/ directory structure
Does NOT create source notes or concept notes
Simply reads and summarizes the PDF content
No git commits made

evals.expected_output: Claude 应该批量处理 .raw/ 目录中的所有文件
expectations: Lists all files in .raw/ directory
Processes each file sequentially
Creates source notes for each file
Updates index after each ingest
Provides progress summary at the end

evals.prompt: 我刚初始化了一个空 wiki，现在想导入一批论文 PDF
evals.expected_output: Claude 应该引导用户将 PDF 放入 .raw/ 目录，然后执行 ingest
expectations: Checks if wiki/ directory exists
If not, runs init.py to create wiki structure
Instructs user to place PDFs in .raw/
Explains the ingest workflow
Offers to process files once placed
